directions: Brown meat in cast iron or oven safe skillet.
Drain all but 1 tablespoon of fat. Stir in onion, green pepper ad garlic.  Saute 5 minutes.
Stir in tomatoes, water, oregano, basil, salt, pepper and spaghetti.  Stir to combine. Push spaghetti down into liquid.
Cover tightly with foil.
Bake at 375 for 30 minutes or until spaghetti is tender.
Cover with Mozzarella and Parmesan cheese. Leave uncovered.
Bake 5 minutes more until cheese is melted.
Serve hot.

name: Best Tasting and Easiest Slow Cooker Pot Roast
directions: Put roast in bottom of slow cooker.
Sprinkle with brown gravy mix and Ranch dressing mix on top.
Place whole stick of butter on top of the roast and mixes.
Lay 4 or 5 slices of pepperoncini peppers around the butter on the top of the roast.
Close lid; set on high; cook 6-1/2 to 7 hours depending on size of roast.

similar.name: The Easiest 3 Ingredient Crock Pot Roast Ever! (Slowcooker)

name: Men's Favorite Meatball Appetizers
directions: Thaw  Meatballs  in refrigerator.
Pour Barbecue Sauce and Cranberry Sauce Into fairly large crock pot.
Set pot on high heat.
Chop cranberry sauce up and stir together somewhat.
When sauces start getting hot, whisk until smooth.
Add meatballs and coat well using 1-2 wooden spoons to avoid breaking up meatballs.
When all gets hot and bubbly reduce heat to low.
Cover and stir occasionally.
Leave covered until all is heated through. the longer they heat, the more sauce gets soaked up by meatballs.
Continue to stir occasionally.
When ready to serve, tilt cover so sauce won't get watered down.
Use  non-slotted spoon to serve. (So everyone can get some of the wonderful sauce).

similar.name: Absolute Best Holiday Meatballs, Crock Pot (Or Not)

name: Cheesy Mustard Steaks
directions: Slach the fat edges of the steaks.
Mix  together the mustard, oil and lemon juice.
Bake the steaks over hot coals for 5-6 minutes on one side, then turn and spread half of the mustard mixture on the cooked side.
Bake for another 5-6 minutes.
Turn the steaks again and spread the remaining mustard mixture on the other side. Sprinkle with herbs and put the slice of cheese on top.
Serve immediatly before the cheese starts to drip.

similar.name: Garlic and Pepper Marinated Flank Steak

name: Grilled Backyard Burgundy Burgers
directions: In medium bowl, mix all ingredients except buns, ketchup and pickles. Cover and refrigerate for a half hour to blend the flavors (not necessary, but recommended).
Shape mixture into 6 patties, about 3/4 inch thick.
Heat gas or charcoal grill.
Place patties on grill rack over medium heat. Cover grill; cook 10 to 15 minutes, turning once, until meat thermometer inserted in center of patties reads 160ºF.
Add buns, cut sides down, for last 4 minutes of grilling or until toasted.
Top burgers with ketchup and pickle planks; serve on buns.

similar.name: Burgers With Sauteed Onions and Horseradish Sauce

name: Doodle's Tater Tot Casserole
directions: Brown Your Ground Beef
Stir In Cream Of Mushroom.
Put Tater Tots In Casserole Dish.
Pour Mixture Over Tater Tots
Cover With Cheese.
Bake At 350 Degrees Untill Golden Brown.

similar.name: Peaked and Tweaked Tater Tot Casserole

name: Crockpot Kielbasa
directions: Cut the kielbasa into about 6 inch links and boil in water to get rid of the excess fat (about 20 minutes).
Remove from water and let cool enough to handle.
Cut kielbasa in to bite-sized pieces.
Mix together kielbasa, chili sauce, and brown sugar in at least a 5-qt crock pot.
Stir well.
Cook for about 2-3 hours on medium-high heat or until everything is heated through and the kielbasa looks glazed over.

name: Amazing Pork Chop or Chicken Marinade
directions: Mix all ingredients together. Marinade 4 Pork Chops or 3-4 Boneless, skinless chicken breasts for 1-2 hours, then grill.
Boil any leftover marinade for at least 5 minutes and pour over grilled meat.

similar.name: Fast, Easy and Delicious Marinade for All Types of Meat

name: Beef/Bacon Veggies Grill Packs #RSC
directions: Form 4 patties out of the ground beef. Place in center of reynolds wrap. Salt and pepper to taste.
Slice zuccchini 1/2" thick. Put slices on top of meat, as many as you prefer, I like lots. Place two slices of bacon on top of zucchini Add chesse to each patty bundle.

Wrap bundles bu closing up top of foil rather loosly. Enclose sides. BBQ should be on medium temperature. Cook for 30 minutes,open and check for desired doneness. If cooked in an oven, 30 minutes at 350.

name: Bread Bowl Corned Beef Dip
directions: Shred or mince Corned Beef.
In a bowl place mayo and sour cream.
Add spice and corned beef.
Stir all ingredients together.
Hollow out round rye bread, set aside insides.
After the dip is blended together put into bread bowl.
Chunk the extra bread into double bite size pieces.
Also good with Trisket crackers.
Enjoy.

name: Berry Kielbasa
directions: Place Kielbasa pieces in a slow cooker.
Pour preserves on top, no stirring is needed.
Cover and cook on a low setting for 4 to 5 hours.
Makes approximately 12 to 18 servings.

similar.name: Tropical Kielbasa for the Crock Pot

name: Hawian Pizza Pops.
directions: Pre-heat oven to 350.
Grease a cookie tray ( I use non stick tin foil ).
Mix Pineapple, Ham, sauce, Oregano and cheese ingredients together in a bowl.
Roll out your dinner rolls and use 2 tbl spoons of your mixture for each wrap.
Fold and seal edges and place in oven for 15 min, until golden brown.
Pull from oven and enjoy.

name: Doritos Taco Bake
directions: 1. Brown hamburger and drain.
2. Add taco seasoning, tomato sauce, a little water, and diced tomatoes. Simmer.
3. In 9x13 dish, press out crescent rolls and roll them to form crust.
4. Here comes the Dairy! Layer hamburger mixture, sour cream and then cheese.
5. Crush about 3/4 of a bag of Doritos and put them on top. Bake at 350 for 30 minute.
6.Serve.

name: Skinny Sloppy Joes
directions: Chop all the vegetables really fine, using a chopper or food processor.

Heat a large skillet over medium high heat. Add the meat to the pan and break it up as it cooks. Season with steak seasoning and cook the meat until it browns, then add onion, garlic, carrots, mushrooms and red peppers to the skillet. Reduce heat to medium and add red wine vinegar and Worcestershire sauce, cook 5 more minutes. Add tomato sauce and paste to pan, stir to combine. Cover and reduce heat to simmer and cook an additional 5 minutes. Using a measuring cup, pile 1/2 cup of sloppy meat onto toasted buns.

similar.name: Sloppy Joe in the Crock Pot

name: Slow-Cooked Beef Pot Roast #RSC
directions: Season the roast with the salt, black pepper, garlic powder & onion powder.

Spray a large slow cooker with cooking spray. Place the roast in the cooker along with all of the remaining ingredients.Cover and cook on low for about 7 hours.  If a slow cooker is not available, use a large deep casserole and bake in the oven at 200f. for about 7 hours.
When the meat is tender & the vegetables are cooked through, carve the meat and serve with the vegetables and yummy gravy, garnished with the chopped fresh chives.

similar.name: Slow Cooker Bottom Round Beef Roast
Kittencal's Pot Roast Marinade and Tenderizer

name: Spicy Jalapeno Sliders Courtesy of Aaron McCargo, Jr.
directions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.

In a large bowl, add ground beef, jalapenos, shallots, panko, heavy cream, cheese, garlic powder, some salt and 1/2 teaspoon black pepper.  Mix together well.  Form into small patties and place in oven for 12 to 15 minutes.
In a seperate bowl, add creme fraiche, salsa verde, pinch of salt and pepper and mix together.  Refrigerate until ready to serve with your sliders.
Lightly spread creme fraiche on both sides of buns.  Place burgers in middle and pick it with a jalapeno.

name: Beef Cabbage Soup
directions: 1.  In a large soup pot, brown beef.
2.  Add all other ingredients except parsley.
3.  Bring to a boil.
4.  Reduce heat and simmer, covered, for 4 hours.
5.  Serve hot with warm bread.

name: Dad's Favorite Chili Recipe
directions: Brown ground beef, onions and celery in a large pan.
Drain off fat.
Add canned ingredients and chili powder.
Cook on low 1 1/2 hours.

similar.name: Bush's Quick and Easy Ground Beef Chili

name: Lasagna With a Tex-Mex Twist
directions: Set oven temp to 350 degrees cook meat, drain fat. In same pot add meat, beans, taco seasoning, green chilies (juice and all) and two tablespoons salsa until heated, mixing well. In a greased lasagna pan, start with uncooked lasagna, top with meat mixture 1/3 of the grated cheese. Repeat 2 more times.  Combine salsa with 2 cups water, pour over the top. Cover tightly with foil, bake for 1 hour.  Uncover, top with sour cream, sliced green onions, sliced black olives and remaining cheese. Cook for 10-15 minutes longer.

name: Beer Sliders
directions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
Combine ground beef, cheese and all seasoning, mixing well.
Form into 2" patties (they will shrink) and place on a greased baking sheet.
Bake for 15-20 minutes; do not overcook or they will be dry.
Combine mayo, mustard, pickle and garlic and refrigerate.  This step can be done well ahead of time.
Split rolls with a serrated knife and pick out some of the interior bread if the rolls are thick.
Place a good dollop of sauce onto bun, add burger and enjoy.

similar.name: Spicy Jalapeno Sliders Courtesy of Aaron McCargo, Jr.
Grilled Mustard-Beer Bratwurst With Toasted Garlic Buns

name: Mexican Burgers With Avocado & Fried Eggs
directions: Put the first 10 ingredients (cumin through onion) in a food processor and puree.  Add half of the ground beef, and pulse to combine everything well.
Put the rest of the ground beef and one tablespoon of cilantro in a large bowl.  Add the beef-spice mixture and stir to combine well.  Form this mixture into four burger patties.
Mix the remaining cilantro with mayo, hot sauce, and lime juice.  Add salt & pepper if desired- I usually don't.  Set aside.
Heat oil in a skillet over medium-high heat.  Cook patties, flipping once, for about 12-15 minutes, or until desired doneness.
Just before the meat is done, melt butter in a separate pan, then crack the eggs into it and cook until whites are firm and yolks are runny, about 3-5 minutes.
Spread the mayo on both inner sides of the buns, then place down avocado slices, meat, fried egg, and pico de gallo.  Serve!

similar.name: Southwestern  Burger With Chipotle Mayonnaise & BBQ Sauce

name: BBQ Spoonburgers
directions: Brown the ground beef and drain off grease.
Stir in the creamed corn and ketchup.
Heat through and serve on toasted hamburger buns.

similar.name: Western Barbecue Burgers W/Beer Barbecue Sauce

name: Twins Favorite Meatloaf
directions: Mix all the ingredient well, by hand; then, put in a non-stick oven pan. Cover the meatloaf with ketchup, and put into the oven for one hour at 350.

name: Grilled Bacon Jalapeno Wraps
directions: 1. Preheat an outdoor grill for high heat.
2. Spread cream cheese to fill jalapeno halves. Wrap with bacon. Secure with a toothpick.
3. Place on the grill, and cook until bacon is crispy.

My Note:   Here's what I found made them great. After slicing the peppers and cleaning them out, drop in boiling water for 4 - 6 minutes. This will pretty much take all the heat out though so if you want a punch, leave the membranes. We taste tested several cream cheese flavors. We picked 3 fav's, they were the cream cheese mixed with a powdered ranch mix, or mixed with a chipotle seasoning, or mixed with worstershire and garlic powder. (we tried 12 different flavors to get this perfect) Also, I found that 1/2 a strip of bacon was not enough - used the whole thing! And finally after you put the pepper together with cheese and bacon and toothpick - freeze it for 15 minute Then 10 minutes on the grill is perfect.

After making these many times, I can tell you that you really need to make them ahead of time and put them in the refrigerator for a couple of hours or the freezer for about 15 minutes. This will allow the cheese to firm up a bit and it won't all leak out of your peppers. I also have found that if you want them hot, leave all of the membrane inside and some seeds. If you want them barely warm(like me), get almost all of the membrane out from inside the pepper and leave no seeds. I cook them in the oven on 350 for about 45 minutes. ***A low calorie version is use fat free cream cheese and wrap each 1/2 pepper with only 1/2 slice of bacon. They are just as good and only about 60 calories each!

similar.name: To Die For! Mexican Hot Dogs
Extreme Bacon and Cheese Stuffed Pizza Burger
Western Barbecue Burgers W/Beer Barbecue Sauce

name: Beef & Sun Dried Tomato Burgers
directions: Combine all ingredients in a large bowl, adjusting quantities to taste (I’ve never measured).  The soy sauce is used in place of salt, apparently it doesn’t dry the meat out like salt would and adds extra flavour (tip from the Chris Evans show on BBC Radio 2).
Mix thoroughly by hand.
Cover with cling film and place in the fridge for at least an hour.
Form into patties and fry/bbq until browned.
Enjoy!

name: Deb’s Foolproof BBQ (Barbequed) Beef Spareribs
directions: Preheat oven to 450 degrees Rinse the ribs, drain them well and season them lightly with salt and pepper. Place the ribs on a rack in a roasting pan (I didn't have one, so I laid 3 ribs of celery lengthwise in a 9 x 13 baking dish and put my ribs on top of the celery). Pour 3 cups of water into the pan and cover the pan with foil. Bake the covered ribs for 30 minutes.

Carefully remove the roasting pan from the oven (watching out for the hot liquid in the bottom of the pan).  Remove the ribs to a platter and drain off all the accumulated liquid from the pan, wiping the pan dry and lowering the oven temperature to 300 degrees.
Return the ribs to the pan. Using approximately 1/4 cup BBQ sauce per pound, brush the BBQ sauce over the top of the ribs. Bake uncovered, for 30 minutes.
Remove the ribs from the oven, turn them over and baste top with another 1/4 cup of BBQ sauce per rib. Return to the oven and bake for an additional 20 minutes.

Remove from the oven and turn the meatiest side up, baste with remaining BBQ sauce. Preheat the top Broiler to 500 degree and place the ribs about 6 inches under the broiler. Allow the ribs to broil for a few minutes, caramelizing the BBQ sauce and then remove them from oven and serve!

similar.name: Hamburgers for the BBQ--Easy to Make and Yummy

name: Rib Eye Steak With Mushrooms & Onions
directions: Spray Xpress Machine cooking base with non-stick cooking spray and preheat.
Brush one side of steak with browning sauce and place sauce side down in cooking base.
Brush top of steak with browning sauce, season, and after 1 minute turn.
Season and top with mushrooms and onion slices.
Close lid and cook around 7 minutes, depending on desired doneness.
Heat up a can of veggies. Make instant potatoes. Complete meal done in 7 minutes.

name: Chili Cheese Fries or Tots
directions: Preheat oven to 425 degrees.  Cook fries or tots according to the directions on the bag.  Meanwhile; brown the sausage in a med pan.  After the sausage is browned drain grease if desired.  Put in the McCormick Chili mix and bottle of chili sauce.  Mix well and simmer on low heat for about 10 minuets.  You may want to add a little water so that the chili does not get too dry during the simmer process.  After the potatoes are cooked to firm and the chili has simmered long enough, place the potatoes into a large enough baking dish so that you have room to add the cheese and chili.   Now add on the chili directly to the top of the fries or tots.  even out the sauce.  Pile on the entire 2lb of super sharp cheddar cheese.   Bake in the oven for approximately 20 minuets.  Keep an eye on the top of the cheese.  You want the edges to be golden brown and you want the middle to be bubbly and rising before you remove the dish from the oven.  Allow to cool for 5 minuets before serving.  Dip and serve.

name: Stuffed Green Peppers
directions: Preheat oven to 275?F. Spray 8x8 glass baking dish. Mix all ingredients except soup. Dilute one can of soup according to can's directions and add to mix. Stuff raw mixture into peppers. Pour the second can of soup (full strength) over top of peppers and into pan.
Bake for 2 hours at 275?F.
Serve with mashed potatoes, spooning extra tomato sauce onto potatoes.

name: Beefy Chipotle Tacos
directions: 1. Cook beef and onion in a large skillet over medium heat until beef is browned
2. drain
3. stir in tomatoes with green chiles, chipotles, the reserved adobo sauce, chilli powder, cumin, oregano, garlic and salt
4. cook over med-low heat 15 min, stirring occasionally
5. remove from heat
6. stir in cilantro
7. For each taco, spoon about 1/3 cup beef mixture onto warm tortilla. top with desired toppings. Enjoy!

similar.name: Southwestern  Burger With Chipotle Mayonnaise & BBQ Sauce

name: Cheeseburger Pie
directions: Preheat oven to 350°F Spray a 9" pie plate with non-stick spray.
Stir together breadcrumbs, chili powder, granulated onion, granulated garlic, brown sugar, pepper, salt and paprika. Add evaporated milk and stir to combine. Set aside for 10 minutes.

Stir again and add beef. Combine well using your hands, then spread into prepared pie dish. Bake in preheated oven 20 minutes. Drain juices from pan (do NOT let the meat slide out of the pan like I did!).
Spread mustard over meat. Spread ketchup on top of mustard. Sprinkle shredded cheese evenly over top. Return to oven for 5 minutes, until cheese is melted.

name: Canadian Prairies Twice Cooked Bison Tenderloin Steaks
directions: From refrigerator, allow the steaks to rest for 45 minutes at room temperature before starting to cook.
Set the oven at 275F, convection preferred, 15 minutes before searing the steaks.
Brush each steak, both sides, with a little clarified butter.*  Sprinkle both sides with some coarse sea salt.
Heat more clarified butter (about 1 tbsp) over high heat in a heavy bottomed frying pan until it's almost smoking.
Sear the steaks, without disturbing, for one minute. Flip them, and sear the opposite side for one minute as well.

Immediately transfer the seared steaks to a wire baking rack set in an open roasting pan. Note: although a vented roasting pan will do, the use of a wire baking rack is a better choice. It allows for better air circulation and helps facilitate even cooking.

We highly recommend the use of an accurate digital meat probe thermometer. Insert the probe horizontally into the middle of one of the steaks. Otherwise, follow the time guidelines suggested below. To maintain even heat, do not open the oven door until the desired level of doneness is reached.
For rare, remove steaks from oven when the probe thermometer reaches 120 to 125F (16 to 18 minutes). For medium-rare, 130 to 135F (22 to 24 minutes). For medium, 140F (28 to 30 minutes).

After coming out of the oven, allow the steaks to rest uncovered at room temperature for 10 to 15 minutes. This breather before serving will allow time for the juices to sink back into the meat. The steaks will stay warm at this stage; in fact internal meat temperature can peak by 3 or 4 degrees while resting.
Then enjoy bison's most tender offering with fries or another of your favorite sides.
*NOTE: Our first choice is clarified butter, but a heat tolerant cooking oil such as peanut oil or grape seed oil can be substituted. Do not use olive oil; it will burn at high heat.

similar.name: Ground Sirloin Steaks With Brown Gravy

name: Southwestern Chili Pasta
directions: In a large skillet, brown ground beef, onion, and red pepper until vegetables are tender and beef is cooked through.  Drain.
Add spices, tomatoes, black beans and water.  Stir together.
Add pasta.  Simmer, covered, until pasta is tender.  May need to add more water.  I simmer it for about 20 minutes.
Serve garnished with shredded cheese and sour cream, if desired.

name: Prairie Braised Buffalo Shanks
directions: In a large pot, brown shanks over med-high heat in veg oil.
Add onion, garlic and carrots.
Stir in water, barley.
Add salt and pepper to taste.
Add coarsely chopped tomatoes.
Bring to a boil and reduce heat.
Cover and simmer on low for 2.5 hours.
Stir in fresh parsley during final 20 minutes of cooking.
Remove meat; remove bay leaf.
Taste and adjust seasonings.
Enjoy!

similar.name: Canadian Prairies Twice Cooked Bison Tenderloin Steaks

name: Steak Heaven
directions: Sprinkle seasoning over both sides of steak (if you are using a very thin cut, only sprinkle one side.
Heat up oil in a med-high skillet, cook on each side until desired doneness (I prefer a thin line of red to maintain flavor).
Remove steaks to plate lined with paper towels. Be careful not to overcook!

name: Fireballs
directions: Combine all ingredients by hand in a large bowl.
Set in refrigerator for 30 minutes to rest and allow flavors to blend.
Preheat oven to 400°F.
Coat the cooling rack of a ½ sheet pan with non-stick spray or olive oil
Roll meat into balls 1½ - 2 inches in diameter (approx. 1 rounded tablespoon.) and place evenly on rack.
Cook at 400° F for 30 minute
Can be added to spaghetti, mac & cheese, salads, used for meatball sandwich, etc.  The possibilities are limited only by your imagination.

similar.name: Absolute Best Holiday Meatballs, Crock Pot (Or Not)

name: Momma's Hamburger Gravy
directions: brown hamburger
add milk, soup and soup cream
heat until heated through
about 10 mins.

similar.name: Beef Patties With Beefy Mushroom Gravy

name: Some Sort of Manwich Like Recipe
directions: cook the ground beef in a wide pot with 3"  high sides.
drain the oil/fat from the cooked beef (you don't eat that crap anyways).
add the remainder ingredients and stir it inches.
eat --  duh!

name: Awesome Hamburger, Rice and Spinach Skillet Dinner.
directions: In a 10" skillet, cook beef, onion and garlic over medium-high heat stirring often, until beef is browned (about 5 minutes).  Drain off excess fat.
Stir in tomatoes, spinach, dill weed, garlic salt and pepper.  Heat to boiling.  Add rice and turn heat to low and cover.
Simmer, covered 25 minutes or until rice is done.
Top with shredded cheese then re-cover, remove from heat.
Let sit (off heat and covered) for 10 minutes until cheese has melted.

name: Slow Cooker Ham
directions: 1. Spread about 1 1/2 cups of brown sugar on the bottom of the slow cooker crock. Place the ham flat side down into the slow cooker - you might have to trim it a little to make it fit. Use your hands to rub the remaining brown sugar onto the ham. Cover, and cook on Low for 8 hours.

My note:   I have sometime used a 9-lb spiral cut honey cured ham with the stated brown sugar amounts and cooked on low for 4 hours. I sealed over the ham with foil and then put on the lid. The ham was delicious and very moist. This is a great option for large family gatherings when your oven is being used for other dishes. I'll definitely do this again.

similar.name: Corned Beef / Corned Silverside for the Crock Pot

name: Gun Ban Niu Rou Si (Sichuan Dry Fried Beef)
directions: In a small bowl, combine the rice wine, chili paste, soy sauce, sichuan pepper and black pepper. Set aside.
Heat a large skillet or wok over high heat until a bead of water sizzles and evaporates upon contact. Add 3 tbsp of the peanut oil, swirl to coat the pan, then wait one minute for the oil to heat up.

Add the beef, spread it out evenly, and allow it to sizzle undisturbed for 2 minutes. Cook the beef for another 2 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the oil becomes clear again. Transfer the meat to a plate lined with paper towels to drain.

Drain the wok of the oil and using a paper towel, wipe clean. Add remaining 1 tbsp oil and heat for 1 minute on medium-high. Add the chilies, garlic and ginger and stir-fry (30 seconds). Add the bell pepper and stir-fry 1 minute more.
Add the beef to the pan and pour in the sauce, making sure to use a spatula to release any brown bits from the bottom of the pan. Toss in the scallions then transfer to a plate and serve.

similar.name: Grilled or Broiled Asian Flank Steak

name: Mighty Mo Burgers
directions: Blend all ingredients except flour and water lightly.  Shape into 3 oz. patties.
Place on baking sheets and bake at 400 degrees F for 15 to 18 minutes; save the drippings.
Stir flour into drippings.  Add water to make 3 cups of gravy.  Cook for 5 minutes after the gravy has thickened.  Serve with 1 tablespoons sauce over each patty.

name: Easier Than the Easy Vegetable Soup Recipe
directions: 1. Fry meat
2. Mix all ingredients until warm. (do not drain any contents).
3. Eat and be happy.

name: Makaronilaatikko (Finnish Macaroni Cheese)
directions: Preheat oven to 425 degrees F.
In a skillet over medium-high heat, cook meat and onion until meat is brown and onion is translucent.
Using either a spray or butter, coat a baking dish and set aside. In a large bowl, mix the milk, eggs, 1/2 cup cheese, nutmeg and season with salt and pepper.
Combine the noodles and meat and pour into the baking dish. Add the egg/milk mixture over the meat/noodles mixture and then layer the remaining cheese on top.
Cook in the oven for 40 minutes, until the cheese on top is golden brown and the casserole is heated through. Garnish each serving with a dollop of ketchup on top.

similar.name: Swedish Meatballs (User Friendly for Younger Cooks)

name: Asian Pasta Salad
directions: Cook pasta according to instruction.
Pan fry chicken strips.
Put all dressing ingredients in a bowl and set aside.
Assembly salad top with seaweed, drizzle dressing over salad.

name: Slow Cooker Beer Chicken
directions: Place chicken in crock pot.
Mix all other ingredients, pour over chicken in the crock pot.
Cook on high for 4-5 hrs, or low for 6-8 hours.
